admin.heading: Admin console
admin.subtitle: Live view of active sessions and games.
admin.confirmDisconnect: Disconnect {nickname}'s session? Any open game WS will be closed.

hero.heading1: A game, a piece of literature.
hero.sub1: 9-kyu to 9-dan, modeled on real human play. KataGo's Human-SL network is your opponent.
hero.sub2: Lee Chang-ho's endgame, Cho Chikun's fighting, Shin Jinseo's balance — pick from 18 masters across 7 styles.
hero.heading3: Read the universe in a single stone.
hero.sub3: Live winrate, score lead, dame-fill detection, auto dead-stone scoring — quiet but deep positional judgment.
hero.heading4: Silence on the board, calculation in the mind.
hero.sub4: Korean rules, half-point komi, auto dead-stone marking. KataGo reads the weight of every move with you.
hero.sub5: Rank-specific human models plus per-master styles — today, pick the opponent that suits your mood.
hero.heading6: A current begins with one move.
hero.sub6: Every move forks a variation — ko or ladder, life or capture — and KataGo reads the resulting shape with you.
hero.heading7: A small universe of nine lines.
hero.sub7: From a 9×9 study board to a full 19×19 game — the same engine meets you across all three sizes.
hero.heading8: The weight of one stone, the balance of two colors.
hero.sub8: Even games up to a nine-stone handicap — narrow the gap with stones; the AI plays both colors with the same honesty.
hero.heading9: No single right answer, but moves that come close.
hero.sub9: KataGo shows how close each move came to its top choice; Learn mode unfolds the better lines too.
hero.sub10: Opening, joseki, life & death, tesuji, middle game, endgame, capturing race — find the best move on a fresh position every day.
hero.heading11: A kifu is the player's trace.
hero.sub11: Every game can be downloaded as SGF and replayed line by line in review mode.
hero.heading12: Do you still remember the tremor of your first move?
hero.sub12: A ladder from 9-kyu to 9-dan — each step you climb becomes its own record.
hero.heading13: Even the AI hesitates, as humans do.
hero.sub13: Human-SL is not a best-move calculator — it mirrors human hesitation and style, and sometimes wanders with you.
hero.heading14: A cup of tea, a single game.
hero.sub14: Nickname-only ephemeral sessions — no timer, no ads, no notifications. Just a quiet match.
hero.sub15: The dame-fill phase is detected automatically, and Korean half-point komi keeps every last point heavy.
hero.sub16: Blunder marks, suggested moves, autoplay — even a lost game shows the next path.
hero.heading17: An opponent in the shape of your style.
hero.sub17: Seven style models — from balanced to rustic — pick the opponent that fits today's mood.
hero.sub18: Paper, wood, kaya, slate — pick the surface you love and meet the same engine on it.
hero.heading19: A dark room, a bright move.
hero.sub19: Light and dark modes share the same paper grain — at dawn or at noon, the kifu flows the same.
hero.sub20: Time to lean in without interruption — beside you, KataGo quietly weighs each move.

home.valueDesc1: Not a labeled difficulty — an actual Human-SL network trained on real games at that rank, 9-kyu to 9-dan.
home.valueDesc2: Seven play styles and 18 historic masters — Lee Chang-ho, Cho Chikun, Shin Jinseo, Ke Jie, and more.
home.valueDesc3: Live winrate and score lead, endgame-phase detection, and KataGo-ownership-driven dead-stone scoring.
home.scrollHint: Enter a nickname below to begin
home.footerNote: Nickname-based ephemeral session — auto-expires after 1 hour of inactivity. See the Privacy Policy for full data retention details.

session.nicknameTaken: This nickname is already in use
session.privacyNote: Nickname sessions auto-expire after 1 hour of inactivity. Game-history deletion can be requested per the procedure in the Privacy Policy.
session.ephemeralNote: This list shows games played in the current session. Kifu records are kept on the server; for deletion, follow the procedure in the Privacy Policy.
session.expiredDesc: Please set a nickname to continue

game.newGameSubtitle: Pick opponent, size, and handicap to begin.
game.aiResignedBody: The AI has laid down its stones. Congratulations.
game.confirmResignDesc: End this game as a loss; the record is saved.
game.confirmPassDesc: If the AI passes right after you, the game is scored immediately. If endgame plays remain, cancel and keep playing.
game.unloadGuardBody: The game isn't finished yet. If you leave this page, you may not be able to return to it.
game.playerNamesDisclaimer: Player names shown here are style references only; this service is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any listed player. The AI uses the generic Human-SL model and is not trained on any individual player's games. See the Terms of Service section 'Use of player names in AI style selection' for details and rights-holder contact.

aiStyleDesc.balanced: Modern all-rounder — territory, influence, fighting as the position calls for
aiStyleDesc.influence: Builds moyo and thickness across the whole board
aiStyleDesc.combative: Leads the game through fighting and tactical combat
aiStyleDesc.classical: New-fuseki paradigm shift — grand, original ideas
aiStyleDesc.rustic: Self-taught, practical over theory — gut-fight Go

daily.title: Challenge
daily.fallbackPrompt: Find the best move in this position.
daily.noMatch: No puzzles match this combination yet — adjust the filters.
daily.noOtherMatch: No other puzzles in this combination. Loosen the filters or try again.

topicPrompt.opening: Opening — claim the biggest open area, keep the balance.
topicPrompt.joseki: Joseki — find the natural reply in the corner sequence.
topicPrompt.life_death: Life & death — the move that decides the group's fate.
topicPrompt.tesuji: Tesuji — the decisive tactical move (no group dies).
topicPrompt.middle_game: Middlegame — invade, reduce, or settle — pick the biggest move.
topicPrompt.endgame: Endgame — find the largest yose, weigh sente vs. gote.
topicPrompt.capturing_race: Capturing race — count the liberties and find the killing tempo.

attribution.gogameguru: From the GoGameGuru Weekly Problems set (An Younggil 8p · David Ormerod). KataGo grades your answer on this position.

daily.credits: Some puzzles are adapted from GoGameGuru's CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 archive. View original license

verdict.weak: Not bad — there's a better idea

prompts.ch-001: White to move — Black has staked corners. Choose between invasion and counter-framework.
prompts.ch-002: Black to move — balance the left and right. Find the connecting move.
prompts.ch-003: Black to move — all star points are taken. Step into the centre or settle a side?
prompts.ch-004: White to move — Black holds all four star points. Where to invade?
prompts.ch-005: Black to move — find the move that decides life or death in the upper-left.
prompts.ch-006: White to move — there's one big yose left. Spot the largest play.
prompts.ch-101: Black to move — White has answered Black's framework. Find the natural next move.
prompts.ch-102: White to move — Black is building central influence. Reduce or settle?
prompts.ch-103: Black to move — sides and centre tangle. Where's the priority?

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Baduk takes your privacy seriously. This policy explains what data we collect, why we collect it, how long we keep it, and the rights you have over it.

collect.title: Data we collect
items: Nickname (up to 32 characters) and a normalised nickname key (used for uniqueness checks only)
Game history: board size, handicap, your colour, scores, win/loss, move sequence (kifu), start and end times
Session token (HttpOnly cookie, opaque random value — not a JWT)
Connection time and last-activity time (auto-purged after 1 hour of inactivity)
Server logs: IP address (rate-limiting and abuse prevention only), request path, response time — see the Retention section below for retention details
What we do NOT collect: email, phone number, payment details, location, device identifiers, profile photo

purpose.title: How we use it
items: To provide game play and display your game history
To check nickname uniqueness (nickname_key field)
To prevent abuse and maintain rate limits
For aggregated, anonymised service statistics (daily active users, average game length, etc.)

retention.title: Retention
items: Session token: discarded after 1 hour of inactivity or on explicit logout
Game history: kept with a nickname snapshot; deleted on user request (see rights below)

Server logs: emitted as JSON to standard output; rotation and deletion follow the log-collection workload's retention configuration in the production environment (the exact retention window depends on the operations infrastructure).

thirdParty.title: Third-party sharing and processors
items: We do not share or transfer your data to any third party.
External services used: Pretendard font CDN (jsdelivr.net), KataGo model download (media.katagotraining.org). No personally identifiable information is transmitted.

rights.title: Your rights
items: Access, correction, or deletion requests: poporyfamily@gmail.com
Nickname change: create a new nickname session
Game history deletion: email the address above with your nickname — processed within 7 business days

minors.title: Minors under 14 (Korean Network Act)
items: Users under 14 years of age must have a legal guardian's consent before using the service.
By registering a nickname you confirm that you are 14 or older.
If guardian consent is required, please contact poporyfamily@gmail.com.

cookies.title: Cookies
items: We use exactly one cookie: the session token (HttpOnly, SameSite=Lax; Secure in production).
No analytics, advertising, or tracking cookies of any kind.

changes.title: Policy changes
items: Material changes will be announced on this page at least one week before taking effect.
The last-updated date at the bottom of this page reflects the current version.

contact.title: Privacy contact
items: Email: poporyfamily@gmail.com

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These terms govern your use of the Baduk service and set out the rights and obligations of the operator and users.

intro.title: About the service
items: 'Baduk' is a free web service for playing Go against the KataGo Human-SL model.
Eighteen strength levels are supported — 9-kyu through 9-dan — with even games or handicap games (2–9 stones on 13×13 and 19×19; 2–5 stones on 9×9).
Three board sizes are supported: 9×9, 13×13, and 19×19.

account.title: Account (nickname session)
items: No email or password registration is required — a nickname alone creates a temporary session.
Sessions expire automatically after 1 hour of inactivity.
A nickname already in use cannot be claimed by a new session (the API responds with HTTP 409); the existing session must expire or be explicitly logged out before the same nickname can be reused.

nickname.title: Nickname rules
items: Length must be between 2 and 32 characters; the limit is applied after Unicode NFKC normalisation and trimming surrounding whitespace.

Disallowed characters — any whitespace (space, tab, newline, NBSP), control characters, emoji and pictographs, regional-indicator (flag) symbols, skin-tone and combining selectors (including ZWJ), and other invisible joiners. Hangul, Latin letters, digits, ordinary punctuation, and common symbols may be combined freely.

Nickname equivalence is decided by NFKC normalisation and case-folding. For example, 'GoMaster' and 'gomaster', or full-width 'Ｇｏ' and half-width 'Go', are treated as the same nickname and cannot both be registered at the same time.

The following nicknames may be restricted from use or registration — (a) impersonation of others or expressions that may be mistaken for staff, administrators, or an official account; (b) profanity, hate speech, discriminatory, sexual, or violent expressions; (c) advertising, spam, or external URLs; (d) expressions that infringe a third party's trademark, copyright, or personality rights; (e) expressions that violate applicable law; (f) nicknames reserved or designated by the operator (used for administrator identification and system messages).

If a nickname matches the criteria above, the operator may reclaim or block it without prior notice and may refuse the creation of new sessions under the same nickname or its variants. In cases of repeated violations, access may be restricted at the IP level.
Inappropriate nicknames may be reported to poporyfamily@gmail.com. The operator will review and act within 7 business days.

A nickname is held temporarily only while a session is active and confers no permanent ownership. After the session expires, the same nickname may be claimed by another user, so returning under the same nickname is not guaranteed.

prohibited.title: Prohibited conduct
items: Automated bots or scripts that generate high request volumes
Registering or using a nickname that violates the Nickname rules section
Exploiting service vulnerabilities or deliberately overloading the infrastructure
Any other conduct that violates applicable law or seriously disrupts the service

aiDisclaimer.title: AI disclaimer
items: KataGo Human-SL is an AI model; its evaluations and hints are for reference only.
The AI's analysis does not guarantee correct play and is provided for educational and recreational purposes.

aiPlayerNames.title: Use of player names in AI style selection
items: The AI style selection screen lists the names of 18 real professional Go players to help convey style categories. These names are used solely as classification references for non-commercial, educational guidance.

This service has no official affiliation, endorsement, or sponsorship from any listed player or from organisations such as the Korea Baduk Association, the Nihon Ki-in, or the Chinese Weiqi Association, and does not present itself as having such a relationship.
The KataGo Human-SL model used here is a generic, rank-trained model — it has not been trained on any individual player's game records and does not impersonate that player.
References are limited to well-known nicknames and publicly known stylistic evaluations; no player's photograph, signature, voice, or personal logo is used.

This section reflects considerations under Article 2(1)(t) of the Korean Unfair Competition Prevention and Trade Secret Protection Act and related personality-rights principles. A listed player or a legitimate rights-holder may write to poporyfamily@gmail.com to request a change or removal of any name; the operator will review within 7 business days (faster for urgent matters) and remove the listing immediately upon a verified reasonable objection.

serviceChanges.title: Changes and interruptions
items: The operator may modify or discontinue features with prior notice.
Emergency maintenance may cause unannounced temporary outages.

ip.title: Intellectual property
items: The 'Baduk' name, design, and source code are owned by the operator.
KataGo is distributed under the MIT licence (source: https://github.com/lightvector/KataGo).
Kifu (SGF records) produced by users belong to those users and may be freely downloaded and shared.

jurisdiction.title: Governing law and disputes
items: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Korea.
Disputes will first be resolved through good-faith negotiation; unresolved matters will be referred to the court of jurisdiction at the operator's registered address.

contact.title: Contact
items: Email: poporyfamily@gmail.com

support.heading: Support Inkbaduk
support.subtitle: Help carry the running cost
support.intro: Inkbaduk runs without ads, subscriptions, or accounts. Every feature is open to everyone, and supporters and non-supporters share the same experience.
support.intro2: Servers, domain, and backups cost a small amount each month, and one person runs all of this. If the site speaks to you, please consider sending a coffee through any of the channels below — those small gestures keep this place alive.
support.memoHint: Add a display name in the transfer memo and we'll list you on the supporters page. ("Anonymous" just bumps the counter by one.)
support.kakaoPayHint: Tapping the link opens the KakaoPay app. No fees.
support.paypalHint: For supporters outside Korea. Send via PayPal balance or any card.
support.disclaimerBody: Inkbaduk is a non-commercial, one-person operation. We do not issue donation receipts. Support is entirely voluntary and grants no special access. Refunds are difficult.
support.nudge: If Inkbaduk is useful to you, please consider supporting the running cost.

supporters.heading: Supporters
supporters.subtitle: Those who kept Inkbaduk running
supporters.intro: This page lists the display names of people who supported Inkbaduk. Amounts, real names, emails, and contact details are never shown.
supporters.counter: {count} supporters in {year} have kept this site running.
